outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Third US aircraft carrier arrives in Middle East as Trump declines to give timeline on ending Iran war
outlets.summary: USS George H.W. Bush enters CENTCOM — 3 carriers in theater for first time since 2003. Trump tells reporters 'don't rush me.' Rules out nuclear weapons. Araghchi in Islamabad.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Kushner and US envoy Witkoff will head to Pakistan for new Iran talks
outlets.summary: White House confirms Saturday departure for Islamabad. Vance on standby. Iran denies talks planned. Hezbollah fires rockets at Shtula. Netanyahu reveals cancer.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran seizes two container ships in Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire
outlets.summary: Focus on Iranian aggression in Hormuz. CENTCOM now redirecting 34 ships. 3rd carrier in theater. Hegseth: war is 'gift to the world.' Trump rules out nukes.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Pete Hegseth Declares Iran War 'Gift To The World' As Americans Get Pummeled At Pump
outlets.summary: Hegseth's 'gift to the world' Pentagon briefing juxtaposed with $4.03 gas prices. Criticism of war's economic toll on Americans.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite extension of ceasefire
outlets.summary: Focus on Lebanon civilian casualties despite ceasefire. 6 killed April 25. Hezbollah fires rockets. IDF retaliates. UN warns of international law violations.

outlets.name: BBC / Irish Times
outlets.headline: Hegseth tells US allies 'time for free-riding is over'; fresh Iran talks confirmed
outlets.summary: Hegseth blasts Europe and Asia for 'free-riding' on US Hormuz action. Witkoff/Kushner to Pakistan. Araghchi in Islamabad. Oil pulling back on talk signals.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Amid truce, Hezbollah attacks IDF in south Lebanon; troops kill 6 gunmen in Bint Jbeil
outlets.summary: Focus on IDF operations in Lebanon. 6 Hezbollah gunmen killed in Bint Jbeil. Shtula rockets. Netanyahu accuses Hezbollah of sabotaging peace. Araghchi in Islamabad.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israeli Soldiers Testify to Widespread Looting in Lebanon: Commanders Know and Do Nothing
outlets.summary: Investigative report on IDF soldiers looting Lebanese homes — 'routine' theft of motorcycles, TVs, sofas. IDF Chief orders MP investigation. Separate: Netanyahu reveals cancer.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: 'Fingers on trigger, target bank ready': Iran warns US of 'eye for head' reprisal
outlets.summary: IRGC Aerospace and Navy joint statement vows reprisal. Separate: Iran FM Araghchi arrives Islamabad for 'bilateral consultations.' Iran rejects Arab League resolution.

outlets.name: Tasnim News Agency
outlets.headline: Araghchi's trip to Islamabad is not for negotiations with Americans
outlets.summary: IRGC-linked agency downplays US talks. Araghchi on regional tour: Pakistan → Oman → Moscow. Iran FM spokesperson: 'No meeting is planned with the US.'
